"-" = Unknown.
397 K5I K5I_NONE_ABOVE (K5I) None of Above Nutritional Approaches CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: nutritional approaches in last 7 days - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
398 K6A K6A_TOTAL_CALORIES (K6A) Calories Received in Last 7 Days CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: parenteral or enteral intake - total calories (%) received in last 7 days. 0 = None, 1 = 1% to 25%, 2 = 26% to 50%, 3 = 51% to 75%, 4 = 76% to 100%, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
399 K6B K6B_FLUID_INTAKE
